stack: Laravel 12 + Inertia.js v2 + React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4
summary: Production-grade SaaS growth infrastructure across all eight dimensions. Strongest in monetization, lifecycle automation, and analytics instrumentation. Primary gaps in viral/referral loops and multi-experiment A/B testing framework.

onboarding_activation.summary: Multi-step onboarding wizard with progressive profiling, lifecycle stage tracking, activation milestones, and welcome email sequences.

findings.title: Multi-step onboarding wizard with use-case segmentation
findings.description: 3-step wizard (Welcome → Preferences → Completion) collects name, use-case (4 options), timezone, and theme. Context-aware CTAs on completion step adapt to user's declared use-case and enabled feature flags.

findings.title: Lifecycle stage tracking with full audit trail
findings.description: LifecycleService manages 7-stage progression (VISITOR → TRIAL → ACTIVATED → PAYING → EXPANSION → AT_RISK → CHURNED). Every transition recorded in user_stage_history with from/to stages, reason, and days_in_previous_stage metadata.

findings.title: Activation milestone tracking with composite health score
findings.description: Dashboard computes account health (0-100) from email verification, settings count, API tokens, subscription status, and login streak. Activation milestones fire when health_score >= 51 (API token) or >= 76 (healthy).

findings.title: Welcome email sequence with feature-gated content
findings.description: 3-email drip: Day 0 (welcome + setup steps), Day 1 (3 things to try), Day 3 (hidden features). Each email adapts CTAs based on enabled feature flags (billing, API tokens, webhooks). Respects marketing_emails preference.

findings.title: Onboarding reminder sequence for incomplete users
findings.description: Separate 3-email sequence (Day 1, Day 3, Day 7) targets users who started but didn't complete onboarding. Automatically suppressed when welcome sequence covers same days.

findings.title: Activation definition is single-signal
findings.description: Activation currently defined solely as onboarding_completed setting. Could strengthen by requiring a composite signal (onboarding + first API token OR first feature usage) to better correlate with retention.
findings.recommendation: Add secondary activation gate requiring at least one feature.used event within 7 days of onboarding completion.

findings.title: No time-to-activation metric surfaced to admins
findings.description: user_stage_history tracks days_in_previous_stage but ProductAnalyticsService doesn't expose median/p90 time-to-activation. Admins see activation rate but not velocity.
findings.recommendation: Add time-to-activation percentiles (median, p75, p90) to admin product analytics dashboard.

monetization_billing.summary: Production-grade billing with 5 tiers, per-seat billing, trial management, A/B pricing, retention coupons, and comprehensive dunning flows.

findings.title: 5-tier pricing with annual discounts and per-seat billing
findings.description: Free → Pro ($19/mo) → Pro Team ($39/seat/mo, 2-4 seats) → Team ($49/seat/mo, 2-50 seats) → Enterprise (custom). Pro Team bridges the 7.7x pricing cliff between Pro and Team. Annual billing offers 20% discount across all tiers.

findings.title: Deterministic A/B pricing experiment infrastructure
findings.description: PricingController assigns users to control/variant cohorts via CRC32 hash of user ID (50/50 split). Variant Pro price configurable via PLAN_PRO_PRICE_MONTHLY_VARIANT env. Anonymous users assigned per session. Consistent assignment across page loads.

findings.title: 14-day trial with grace period and conversion tracking
findings.description: Free trial grants Pro-tier access for 14 days. 7-day grace period after expiration before downgrade to Free. CheckExpiredTrials command logs TRIAL_EXPIRED events. Idempotent lifetime check prevents re-logging.

findings.title: 3-stage dunning sequence with payment recovery
findings.description: DunningReminderNotification sends gentle → urgent → final emails. 7-day past-due grace period before downgrade. PaymentRecoveredNotification clears dunning on successful retry. Stripe webhook integration for real-time payment status.

findings.title: PQL-driven upgrade prompts at 50/80/100% usage thresholds
findings.description: PlanLimitService fires PqlThresholdReached events at 50%, 80%, and 100% of plan limits. 24-hour suppression per threshold. Upgrade prompts flashed to session and shared via Inertia props. SendPqlUpgradeNudge listener sends LimitThresholdNotification with 14-day suppression.

findings.title: Retention coupon in cancellation flow
findings.description: CancelSubscriptionDialog collects cancellation reason + feedback, then offers 20% discount for 3 months before final cancel. Retention coupon ID configurable via RETENTION_COUPON_ID env. Cancellation reasons: missing_features, too_expensive, switching_tools, not_using_it, poor_support, other.

findings.title: Redis-locked subscription mutations prevent double-charges
findings.description: BillingService wraps all Stripe API calls in Redis distributed locks (35s timeout). Prevents concurrent upgrade/cancel/swap requests. ConcurrentOperationException thrown on lock failure.

findings.title: No usage-based/metered billing despite infrastructure
findings.description: Database columns meter_id and meter_event_name exist on subscription_items but no active metering is implemented. Infrastructure is ready but unused.
findings.recommendation: Consider API call metering for Pro/Team tiers as an expansion revenue lever.

findings.title: Enterprise tier lacks self-serve checkout
findings.description: Enterprise is custom-quote only with no automated signup. ContactSalesController handles inbound but no automated proposal or self-serve enterprise checkout exists.
findings.recommendation: Add self-serve enterprise trial or automated demo booking for high-intent leads.

seo_discovery.summary: Comprehensive SEO infrastructure with structured data, dynamic sitemap, 15+ public content pages, competitor comparison pages, and AI crawler directives.

findings.title: Rich structured data (Organization + SoftwareApplication + FAQPage + BlogPosting)
findings.description: JSON-LD schemas on all public pages. Organization schema with contact point. SoftwareApplication with feature list, pricing, and category. FAQPage on homepage. BlogPosting on each blog article with publication dates.

findings.title: Dynamic sitemap with 40+ URLs across 7 content hubs
findings.description: Cached 24hr sitemap covers: homepage, 6 feature pages, 8 competitor comparison pages, 8 guide articles, blog posts (dynamic), legal pages, changelog, roadmap, API docs. Priority and change frequency tuned per page type.

findings.title: 8 competitor comparison pages for bottom-of-funnel SEO
findings.description: Individual comparison pages vs Jetstream, Spark, SaaSykit, Wave, Shipfast, Supastarter, Larafast, Makerkit. Feature matrix + pricing + pros/cons. Targets 'X vs Y' search queries.

findings.title: 8 pillar content guides with reading time estimates
findings.description: Long-form guides (7-25 min read): SaaS building, Stripe billing, feature flags, starter kit comparison, SaaS cost analysis, 2FA, webhooks, multi-tenancy. Educational content for top-of-funnel traffic.

findings.title: llms.txt for AI training directives
findings.description: Custom /llms.txt endpoint instructs AI crawlers on authorized vs prohibited content sections. Includes product summary, stack, differentiators, and alternatives. Forward-looking SEO for AI-generated answers.

findings.title: Blog with Markdown rendering and per-post meta tags
findings.description: Dynamic blog from /resources/content/blog/*.md with frontmatter. Per-post Open Graph, Twitter Card, and BlogPosting JSON-LD. Cached per-post (3600s). Tags and reading time metadata.

findings.title: No social share buttons on content pages
findings.description: Blog posts, guides, and comparison pages have Open Graph meta tags but no share-to-Twitter/LinkedIn buttons. Reduces organic amplification of content.
findings.recommendation: Add share buttons with pre-populated copy to blog, guides, and comparison pages.

findings.title: No RSS feed for blog
findings.description: Blog content exists but no /feed or /rss.xml endpoint. Limits syndication and subscriber acquisition.
findings.recommendation: Add RSS 2.0 feed endpoint for blog posts.

virality_referral.summary: Basic viral mechanics (roadmap voting, NPS surveys, team seat billing) but no formal referral program, team invite flow, or social sharing features.

findings.title: Public roadmap with authenticated voting
findings.description: Users vote on upcoming features at /roadmap. Votes stored per user + entry slug. Encourages sharing roadmap items with team to rally votes. Hybrid data source (JSON fallback to DB).

findings.title: NPS survey with promoter identification
findings.description: NPS survey eligible after 7 days with 90-day cooldown. Promoters (9-10 score) identified for potential ambassador/case study recruitment.

findings.title: Per-seat billing creates natural team expansion
findings.description: Pro Team (2-4 seats) and Team (2-50 seats) tiers incentivize inviting colleagues. Seat quantity management UI enables self-serve expansion.

findings.title: No referral or affiliate program
findings.description: No referral_code, referred_by, or commission tracking. No mechanism for users to share referral links or earn rewards for bringing new users.
findings.recommendation: Implement referral link generation (?ref=USER_CODE), attribution tracking on signup, and reward system (account credit or extended trial).

findings.title: No team invite or collaboration flow
findings.description: Seat-based billing exists but no workflow to invite team members by email, manage team roles, or share resources. Users must create accounts independently.
findings.recommendation: Build team invite flow: email invitation → signup with team association → shared workspace access.

findings.title: No share-to-social functionality
findings.description: No Twitter/LinkedIn share buttons on blog posts, guides, roadmap items, or changelog entries. Limits organic content amplification.
findings.recommendation: Add social share buttons with pre-populated text to all public content pages.

findings.title: No embeddable widgets for link building
findings.description: No embed codes for roadmap widget, feedback widget, or status badges that external sites could display. Missed link-building opportunities.
findings.recommendation: Create embeddable JavaScript widgets (roadmap, status badge) with backlinks to main site.

findings.title: NPS promoters not automatically recruited as ambassadors
findings.description: NPS identifies promoters (score 9-10) but no automated follow-up to recruit them for testimonials, case studies, or referral programs.
findings.recommendation: Auto-send ambassador recruitment email to NPS promoters with incentive offer.

analytics_instrumentation.summary: 86+ tracked events with GA4 integration, PII sanitization, consent-gated tracking, composite user scoring, and admin analytics dashboards.

findings.title: 86+ analytics events with backend/frontend sync enforcement
findings.description: AnalyticsEvent enum covers auth (13), onboarding (3), trial (3), billing (18), admin (28), user actions (6), engagement (3), activation (1), PQL (3) events. AnalyticsEventSyncTest validates PHP enum matches JS event constants.

findings.title: GA4 Measurement Protocol with PII sanitization and consent gating
findings.description: Backend sends events via GA4 Measurement Protocol with 35-key PII blocklist. Frontend queues up to 20 pre-consent events, flushes on consent grant. Async job dispatch with exponential backoff retries.

findings.title: Composite user scoring (health, engagement, lead) with automated computation
findings.description: Three scoring models: Health (login freq + feature adoption + billing + profile), Engagement (recency + features + onboarding + maturity), Lead (engagement*0.5 + health*0.3 + PQL*0.2). Batch computed daily at 02:00. MQL >= 60, SQL >= 80 thresholds trigger LeadQualifiedEvent.

findings.title: Admin product analytics with onboarding funnel and feature adoption
findings.description: Admin dashboard shows: 7-day signup trend, onboarding funnel (registered → started → completed with conversion rates), activation rate, top 10 feature adoption by week, subscription event counts. All cached 5-60 minutes.

findings.title: UTM first-touch attribution captured to user model
findings.description: CaptureUtmParameters middleware stores utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_content, utm_term in session on first visit. Persisted to User model during registration. Enables acquisition channel analysis.

findings.title: Cohort retention metrics (D7, D30) with trial conversion rate
findings.description: CustomerHealthService calculates D7/D30 retention using 3-day cohort windows. Activation rate (email verified within 7 days). Trial conversion rate (trial users with active subscriptions). Cached via AdminCacheKey.

findings.title: No sequential funnel analysis beyond onboarding
findings.description: Onboarding funnel tracked (registered → started → completed) but no general-purpose funnel builder for custom sequences (e.g., pricing_viewed → checkout_started → subscription_created).
findings.recommendation: Add configurable funnel analysis to ProductAnalyticsService supporting arbitrary event sequences.

findings.title: No email open/click tracking visible in schema
findings.description: EmailSendLog tracks sends but no open or click events. Limits ability to optimize email content and subject lines.
findings.recommendation: Integrate email provider webhooks (Mailgun, SES) for open/click event tracking.

findings.title: No session recording or heatmap integration
findings.description: No integration with Amplitude, FullStory, Hotjar, or PostHog for session replay and heatmap analysis. Limits qualitative user behavior insights.
findings.recommendation: Add optional session recording integration behind feature flag.

engagement_retention.summary: Comprehensive lifecycle email automation with 8+ drip sequences, re-engagement campaigns, win-back flows, trial nudges, and in-app notifications.

findings.title: 4-email re-engagement sequence with behavioral segmentation
findings.description: Targets inactive users at 7, 14, 21, 30 days. High-engagement users (score >= 60) receive upgrade-CTA variant. Paid users get different messaging at Day 21. Escape hatch skips subsequent emails if user re-engages.

findings.title: 3-email trial conversion nudge sequence
findings.description: Sent at 7 days remaining, 3 days remaining, and just expired. Skips users who already converted. Respects marketing opt-out. Scheduled daily at 10:00.

findings.title: 3-email win-back sequence for churned subscribers
findings.description: Targets canceled/expired subscriptions at Day 3, Day 14, Day 30 after cancellation. Skips reactivated users. Separate involuntary churn win-back for payment-failed cancellations.

findings.title: Dunning email sequence with payment recovery notification
findings.description: 3-stage dunning (gentle → urgent → final) with 7-day past-due grace period. PaymentRecoveredNotification clears dunning state on successful retry. Lifecycle stage transitions to AT_RISK on payment failure.

findings.title: Email send log with deduplication and opt-out respect
findings.description: EmailSendLog model with unique constraint on (user_id, sequence_type, email_number) prevents duplicate sends. All lifecycle commands check marketing_emails user setting. Idempotent re-runs are safe.

findings.title: In-app notification system with admin broadcast
findings.description: Laravel DatabaseNotification with read/unread tracking, notification dropdown UI, mark-as-read API. Admin can broadcast announcements to all users or admin-only. 14-day volume chart in admin dashboard.

findings.title: Changelog with unread badge for feature discovery
findings.description: Public changelog at /changelog tracks last-seen version per user. Unread changelog badge triggers return visits. Source from /public/changelog.json.

findings.title: No automated churn prediction model
findings.description: Re-engagement triggers on fixed inactivity windows (7/14/21/30 days) but no predictive model using engagement_score, feature_usage, or login_frequency to identify at-risk users before they go silent.
findings.recommendation: Add churn risk scoring that combines engagement_score trend, login recency, and feature adoption decline to proactively flag at-risk users.

findings.title: No push notification channel
findings.description: Notifications sent via database (in-app) and mail channels only. No web push (Service Worker) or mobile push integration for real-time engagement.
findings.recommendation: Add web push notification support for time-sensitive alerts (payment failures, expiring trials).

conversion_optimization.summary: Strong pricing page with social proof, trust signals, and A/B pricing. Comprehensive CTA strategy across public pages. Limited multi-experiment capability.

findings.title: Pricing page with social proof, trust strip, and urgency signals
findings.description: Testimonial carousel, 'Join hundreds of developers' social proof, 'Most Popular' badge on Pro tier, trial countdown, 'Complete your upgrade' for incomplete purchases. Trust strip: cancel anytime, Stripe security, 14-day money-back guarantee.

findings.title: Buy page with cost comparison and fit/anti-fit messaging
findings.description: Shows $15K-$30K build cost vs template price. 'Is this right for you?' section with good-fit/not-for-you criteria. Trust signals: secure checkout, money-back guarantee, source code ownership.

findings.title: Annual billing toggle with savings badge
findings.description: Monthly/annual toggle on pricing page with 'Save X%' badge. Coupon code UI with collapsible input. Per-seat calculator for team tiers.

findings.title: 21 notification classes covering full user lifecycle
findings.description: Notifications span: welcome (3), onboarding (3), trial (3), re-engagement (4), win-back (3), dunning (3), payment (4), admin (1). Each sequence respects opt-out and deduplication.

findings.title: Scheduled automation with 10+ cron jobs
findings.description: Daily: welcome sequence, onboarding reminders, trial nudges, dunning, win-back, lead qualification, score computation, health alerts, data pruning. Weekly: re-engagement. Hourly: incomplete payment checks.

findings.title: Experiment framework ready for multi-variant testing
findings.description: HandleInertiaRequests shares 'experiments' prop (currently empty). FeatureFlagService has getExperimentVariant() with stable CRC32 hash for consistent assignment. Infrastructure supports multi-experiment A/B testing.

findings.title: Only one active A/B test (Pro pricing variant)
findings.description: Experiment infrastructure supports multiple tests but only Pro tier pricing variant is implemented. No experiments on CTAs, copy, layout, or feature positioning.
findings.recommendation: Expand A/B testing to homepage hero copy, annual vs monthly default display, and CTA button text.

findings.title: No experiment result analysis dashboard
findings.description: A/B test cohorts are assigned and events are logged, but no admin dashboard shows conversion rates by cohort or statistical significance.
findings.recommendation: Add experiment results view to admin analytics showing conversion rate per cohort with confidence intervals.

platform_ecosystem.summary: RESTful API with Sanctum auth, webhook system, OpenAPI docs, personal data export, and GDPR compliance. Missing SDK, marketplace, and integration directory.

findings.title: RESTful API with Sanctum token auth and per-feature rate limiting
findings.description: API endpoints for user, settings, notifications, tokens, and webhooks. Rate limits: 60/min read, 30/min write, 20/min tokens, 5/min webhook tests. Feature-gated endpoints respect config flags.

findings.title: Full webhook system with HMAC signing and delivery tracking
findings.description: Outgoing webhooks with HMAC-SHA256 signing via DispatchWebhookJob. Incoming webhook verification middleware. Webhook endpoint CRUD with delivery history. Test endpoint for debugging.

findings.title: Auto-generated API docs via Scribe (OpenAPI 3.0.3)
findings.description: Scribe configured to generate OpenAPI spec + Postman collection. Feature-gated behind FEATURE_API_DOCS. Generates interactive docs at /docs endpoint.

findings.title: GDPR-compliant personal data export and account deletion
findings.description: PersonalDataExportController exports user profile, settings, social accounts, tokens, webhooks, and audit logs (last 1000) as JSON. Account deletion hard-deletes user with cascading cleanup. Audit logs preserved with nullified user_id.

findings.title: Comprehensive security headers with CSP nonce
findings.description: SecurityHeaders middleware: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, HSTS, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, CSP with nonce-based script execution. X-Robots-Tag noindex for authenticated routes.

findings.title: Cookie consent with granular categories and audit trail
findings.description: CookieConsent component offers necessary/analytics/marketing categories. POST /api/consent logs choices. GA4 only loads after consent. Pre-consent events queued and flushed on grant.

findings.title: No public SDK or client library
findings.description: API is RESTful and documented but no official SDK (JavaScript, PHP, Python) for third-party integration. Developers must build their own HTTP clients.
findings.recommendation: Generate TypeScript SDK from OpenAPI spec for developer adoption.

findings.title: No integration directory or marketplace
findings.description: Webhook system supports integrations but no public directory showing available integrations or featured partner apps.
findings.recommendation: Build /integrations page showcasing webhook-based integrations with setup guides.

findings.title: No developer changelog or API versioning
findings.description: Public changelog exists for product updates but no API-specific changelog or versioning scheme. Breaking API changes could surprise integrators.
findings.recommendation: Add API version prefix (/api/v1/) and developer-focused changelog for API changes.

top_recommendations.title: Build referral program with attribution tracking
top_recommendations.description: Implement referral link generation, attribution on signup, and reward system. Currently the biggest gap in the growth stack — no organic user acquisition mechanism exists.

top_recommendations.title: Add team invite flow for seat-based plans
top_recommendations.description: Build email invitation → signup → team association flow. Seat billing exists but team members must create accounts independently, breaking the viral loop.

top_recommendations.title: Add social share buttons to all public content
top_recommendations.description: Add Twitter/LinkedIn share buttons with pre-populated copy to blog posts, guides, comparison pages, and changelog. Quick win for organic amplification.

top_recommendations.title: Expand A/B testing to multiple experiments
top_recommendations.description: Infrastructure ready but only Pro pricing variant active. Expand to homepage copy, CTA text, annual/monthly default, and feature positioning experiments.

top_recommendations.title: Build churn prediction model from engagement signals
top_recommendations.description: Combine engagement_score trend, login recency decline, and feature adoption drop to proactively identify at-risk users before they go silent. Currently reactive (fixed 7/14/21/30 day windows).

top_recommendations.title: Add custom funnel analysis to admin analytics
top_recommendations.description: Extend ProductAnalyticsService to support arbitrary event sequences (e.g., pricing_viewed → checkout_started → subscription_created) beyond the hardcoded onboarding funnel.

top_recommendations.title: Strengthen activation definition with composite signal
top_recommendations.description: Add secondary activation requirement (first feature.used event within 7 days) alongside onboarding completion to better correlate with long-term retention.

top_recommendations.title: Generate TypeScript SDK from OpenAPI spec
top_recommendations.description: Auto-generate TypeScript client library from Scribe's OpenAPI output. Lowers integration friction and drives developer adoption.
